summary: The implementation appears largely complete and aligned with the BuildRequest. All 8 requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-8) have corresponding implementations in the diff. Backend storage, CRUD operations, frontend components, and React Query hooks are all present. However, some minor discrepancies exist: the backend implementation includes file size validation (5MB limit) in EventPhotoUpload.tsx that contradicts the non-goal of 'no size restrictions,' and the delete confirmation dialog implementation in EventPhotoUpload.tsx needs verification against REQ-7. Overall confidence is high that the core requirements are met.

hallucinated_features.description: File size validation (5MB limit) in EventPhotoUpload.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly states in non-goals: 'Adding size or format restrictions on uploads.' The implementation adds a MAX_FILE_SIZE constant of 5MB and validates files against this limit, which contradicts the specified non-goal.
